title: Tangy Italian Tart
description: A sweet and tangy tart with a buttery crust, topped with a layer of jam and a tangy Italian filling.
instructions: Roll out the dough on a lightly floured surface to a thickness of about 1/8 inch.
Transfer the dough to a 9-inch tart pan with a removable bottom.
In a medium bowl, whisk together the sugar, jam, and Italian filling.
Pour the filling into the tart shell and smooth the top.
Bake for 35-40 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown and the filling is set.
Remove from the oven and let cool on a wire rack for 10 minutes.
Dust with confectioners' sugar and serve.
